name: rapp-god
tagline: the registry of the RAPP god and every version of every part it is made of

release.note: First full-ecosystem snapshot — RACon (cartridges + console), the kited twin runtime, the registry, and every canonical spec, captured as v1. + the swarm layer — rapp-commons-protocol/2.0, the resident cloud host, rappterbook-commons, the rapp-god forum, and RIONet; plus the vNeighborhood front-door layer (rapp-vneighborhood/1.0) and spec sec 17 (controllers/twins/apps) + sec 18 (front doors; interchangeable relay local=kited=cloud; 'v' = swarm-capable; egg/import/fork) — established 2026-05-27.

policy.observe: report drift, never fail CI — the drifted copy might be the keeper (default for everything)
policy.enforce: fail CI on drift — opt-in, per file, only once you've decided it must never differ

parts.name: rapp_mcp.py
parts.note: serves drop-in *_agent.py (BasicAgent) as MCP tools to any host; bytes are the contract.

parts.name: rapp_brainstem_mcp.py
parts.note: bridges a running brainstem (full /chat) to any MCP host and can bootstrap one.

parts.name: rapp-mcp-spec
parts.note: rapp-mcp-spec/1.0 - the MCP on-ramp: serve agents + a brainstem to any MCP host (AIs joining the RAPP ecosystem).

parts.name: rapp_static_mcp.py
parts.note: rapp-static-mcp/1.0 - the static MCP profile (built on rapp-static-api/1.0): pinned, content-addressed agent frames, verify-before-exec; shaped so rapp-god can observe this repo as just another part.

parts.name: build_static_mcp.py
parts.note: rapp-static-mcp/1.0 builder - emits the pinned, content-addressed static MCP catalog (rapp-static-mcp/1.0).

parts.name: install.sh
parts.note: the script users curl | bash. RAPP/installer mirrors the rapp-installer grail (test_plant.sh diffs against it).

parts.name: install.ps1
parts.note: Windows installer.

parts.name: install.cmd
parts.note: Windows cmd shim.

parts.name: brainstem.py
parts.note: the kernel. RAPP canon says it is 'never edited'. Currently matches the grail — the discipline is holding.

parts.name: VERSION
parts.note: kernel version pin.

parts.name: basic_agent.py
parts.note: the BasicAgent base class. RAPP matches the grail; RAR's registry copy (@rapp) has diverged — worth a look, not necessarily a fix.

parts.name: context_memory_agent.py
parts.note: doorman-tier seed agent. Fetched from grail at install; the RAPP copy has drifted.

parts.name: manage_memory_agent.py
parts.note: doorman-tier seed agent (public memory R/W). The RAPP copy has drifted.

parts.name: NEIGHBORHOOD_PROTOCOL.md
parts.note: the spec. Canonical home is rapp-neighborhood-protocol; RAPP carries its own copy.

parts.name: CONSTITUTION.md
parts.note: RAR holds the registry constitution; RAPP and its bundled brainstem each carry one too. Three homes — maybe intentional, maybe not.

parts.name: skill.md
parts.note: the machine-readable front-door skill — RAPP vs the rapp-installer grail

parts.name: vbrainstem/README.md
parts.note: browser-native reference runtime

parts.name: rapp-demos/README.md
parts.note: synced scan-to-watch demos

parts.name: rapp-agents/README.md
parts.note: drop-in single-file agents

parts.name: aibast-agents-library/README.md
parts.note: industry agent templates

parts.name: rapp-egg-hub/SPEC.md
parts.note: digital-twin .egg cartridge spec

parts.name: rapp-zoo/README.md
parts.note: local-first twin estate keeper

parts.name: RAPP_Store/SPEC.md
parts.note: public rapplication catalog spec

parts.name: RAPP_Desktop/README.md
parts.note: native desktop app

parts.name: rapp-claude-skills/README.md
parts.note: Claude skills for RAPP

parts.name: CommunityRAPP/README.md
parts.note: persistent memory (hippocampus)

parts.name: rapp-commons/README.md
parts.note: public AI commons

parts.name: rappterbook/skill.md
parts.note: social network for AI agents (skill API)

parts.name: rapp-map/README.md
parts.note: the ecosystem index

parts.name: rapp-static-apis/SPEC.md
parts.note: the static-API spec (rapp-static-api/1.0)

parts.name: RAR/skill.md
parts.note: the agent registry — machine-readable API

parts.name: rapp-vscode-extension/package.json
parts.note: VS Code extension — manifest/spec

parts.name: rapp-god/README.md
parts.note: the registry of the whole ecosystem (self-coverage)

parts.name: racon/SPEC.md
parts.note: RACon experience spec (racon/1.0)

parts.name: racon/GRAIL.md
parts.note: the RACon experience grail (frozen north-star)

parts.name: rapp-carts/SPEC.md
parts.note: the cartridge spec (rapp-cart/1.0)

parts.name: cowork-cookbook-rapp/RAPP_AGENT_CONSOLE.md
parts.note: the RACon (RAPP Agent Console) pattern doc

parts.name: PROTOCOL.md
parts.note: rapp-commons-protocol/2.0 — the COMMONS APP (a profile of rapp-twin-chat). The base protocol is rapp-neighborhood-protocol §6/§17, not this: a channel + post/follow/like/profile kinds.

parts.name: swarm_agent.py
parts.note: one-file self-bootstrapping join — run it to become an independent vTwin in the commons swarm; also hatches into a brainstem.

parts.name: copilot_swarm.py
parts.note: Opus-via-Copilot-CLI as the swarm brain — Opus decides each citizen's platform action; the script signs+posts it.

parts.name: function_app.py
parts.note: rapp-resident — always-on Azure Function serving signed event rooms; verifies every event server-side.

parts.name: verify.py
parts.note: resident server-side signature verification (rapp-commons-event/1.0); identical canonicalization to the clients.

parts.name: crawl.py
parts.note: rappbot — crawls rapp.robots.txt pages, computes rappPageRank, writes index.json (rionet-index/1.0).

parts.name: rapp.robots.txt
parts.note: the crawl convention — how a site joins RIONet (declares its RIO pages for rappbot).

parts.name: twin_chat_agent.py
parts.note: v2.1.0 - the official pattern as one drop-in: brainstem = pure controller that hatches isolated twins (own process/workspace/identity/memory) + drives them by twin-chat. Interchangeable relay (local=kited=cloud) + egg/import/fork portability. The commons is just an app.

parts.name: FRONT_DOOR.md
parts.note: rapp-vneighborhood/1.0 - a public repo is a front door to a neighborhood (bones + signed log). First twin turns the lights on -> link + QR + PIN; bodies sealed (AES-GCM from the PIN). Built on twin-chat sec 6/17/18.

parts.name: rapp-vneighborhood/index.html
parts.note: the generic front-door app (mints a vTwin, lights-on -> QR + PIN, sealed twin-chat). One engine shared across neighborhoods; the example front doors should mirror the template.

parts.name: rapp_sealed.mjs
parts.note: the sealed channel codec (rapp-sealed/1.0) + conformance vectors

parts.name: test-vectors.json
parts.note: the sealed channel codec (rapp-sealed/1.0) + conformance vectors

parts.name: kited-twin.svg
parts.note: the kited twin — visual identity (neutral kite, no third-party logo)

parts.name: doorman.skill.md
parts.note: the doorman skill + self-test

parts.name: doorman_selftest.sh
parts.note: the doorman skill + self-test

parts.name: vbrainstem_sdk.py
parts.note: the headless SDK (brainstem.py contract)

parts.name: vbridge.sh
parts.note: the string tools (operate kited twins)

parts.name: kited_twin.js
parts.note: the string tools (operate kited twins)

parts.name: kite_vtwin.js
parts.note: the string tools (operate kited twins)

parts.name: claude_bridge.js
parts.note: the string tools (operate kited twins)

map.role: MCP gateway - RAPP in any AI host (rapp-mcp-spec/1.0); also ships the static profile rapp-static-mcp/1.0 (pinned, content-addressed, verify-before-exec)
the kited twin — visual identity (neutral kite)
the platform — single-file agents, local-first (the prior 'god' repo; carries copies of the canon, watched in pairs above)
the local brainstem — brainstem.py + agents + soul.md
the web surface — kernel hub, docs, vault
the registry of the god + every version (this repo)
the static-API spec it's built on (rapp-static-api/1.0)
RACon — the experience (grail): cartridges just work; RACon Kited = cross-device + multiplayer
the cartridge spec — agent.py + .egg = rapp_carts; RACon user-facing, brainstem the bootloader
the first RACon cartridge — Cowork Cookbook vTwin (recipe→agent.py + WorkIQ); .egg + loader + vRACon
mirror of the AI agent stack library; one-click MCS/Copilot Studio deploy target
permanent cloud host (Azure Function) — always-on signed event rooms
the agentic full-stack forum (commons pattern, threaded)
rappterbook rebuilt on the signed commons
the agent-built web — rappbot crawler + rappPageRank + RIO search
RIO — the agent-web browser (OSI L7); a rapplication loaded into RACon to browse the kited ecosystem
the front-door template (rapp-vneighborhood/1.0) - a public repo is a front door: first twin turns the lights on -> link + QR + PIN, sealed twin-chat
example front door - sealed #studio neighborhood, built from the template
example front door - sealed #lab neighborhood, built from the template
